title: xylocarpus moluccensis var. ellipticus
intro: Xylocarpus moluccensis var. ellipticus, also known as the elliptical murrayrose tree, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Xylocarpus moluccensis var. ellipticus include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve immune function. The plant is often prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, and its extracts can also be used in the form of oils, tinctures, or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
